scripts.start: docker compose up -d && PORT=3000 npm run -w backend dev & PORT=5173 npm run -w frontend dev
scripts.stop: pkill -f 'nest start' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'vite' 2>/dev/null; docker compose stop; echo 'All services stopped'
scripts.restart: npm run stop && sleep 2 && npm run start
scripts.dev: PORT=3000 npm run -w backend dev & PORT=5173 npm run -w frontend dev
scripts.build: npm run -w backend build && npm run -w frontend build
